criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across platforms.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality of the app interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, design awards

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Community Engagement
criteria.description: Level of user interaction and community features within the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app descriptions, social media engagement

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Measures taken to ensure user data privacy and security.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, user reviews, security audits

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Uniqueness and innovation in the app's approach to lifestyle management.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app descriptions, industry awards
